content:
✨ crosspaste-desktop | Kotlin
🎯 Primary Use Case: To synchronize clipboard content across different devices and operating systems, allowing users to copy on one device and paste on another effortlessly.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time Sharing • Unified Cross-platform (Mac, Windows, Linux) • Rich Type Support (Text, Color, URL, HTML, RTF, Image, File) • End-to-End Encryption • LAN-only Serverless Architecture
📖 Summary: CrossPaste Desktop is a cross-platform application that enables seamless clipboard sharing across multiple devices. It supports various data types, offers end-to-end encryption, and operates in a serverless, LAN-only mode for enhanced privacy.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
